extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož won Stage 8 from a reduced group sprint, demonstrating Tour de France form after aggressive riding two days consecutively.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ attacked aggressively day before stage 8, then still had sprint legs to win from reduced group finish.
Jumbo-Visma set rapid train pace to control 15-rider break despite best-placed GESCHKE only 5:19 down overall.
ROLLAND Pierre targeted KOM from day one, tactically riding selective climbs rather than every breakaway opportunity.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Won after going deep previous day with attack, suggesting Sierra Nevada altitude camp produced peak Tour form
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Finished ninth on stage after towing ROGLIČ, demonstrating domestique willingness despite GC second place
rider_signals.GESCHKE Simon: neutral: Best-placed breakaway rider at 5:19 down allowed only minimal gap, confirming Jumbo's total race control
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: Sprinted into third place on mountain finish from reduced group despite being third overall
rider_signals.HANSEN Tobias: negative: White jersey had danger moment on final climb requiring rescue despite week-long comfortable lead
